## Checks

- [ ] No em-dashes (`—`, U+2014) introduced in the diff. En-dashes (`–`, U+2013) in numeric ranges are fine.
- [ ] If a new claim about a `rustc` symbol is added, it cites `path/to/file.rs::SymbolName@<short-SHA>`.
- [ ] `mdbook build` runs clean locally, or the Cloudflare preview deploy is OK with you as the check.
